overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a nighttime walk through a rain-soaked cyberpunk city street. The scene blends traditional Japanese-inspired architecture with futuristic skyscrapers, illuminated by neon signs and streetlights reflecting off wet pavement through heavy atmospheric haze.

scene_state.functional_zone: rainy cyberpunk sidewalk with traditional architecture

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wet sidewalk past traditional Japanese-style buildings with glowing red neon signage

entered.detail: wooden structure with lit windows and red neon signage on the roof
glowing red Japanese characters mounted on the building facade
tall palm trees lining the street against the dark rainy sky
metal fencing running along the sidewalk with construction materials behind
tall lampposts casting yellow-orange light through the rain
overhead electrical wires and utility poles crisscrossing above the street

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a rain-soaked cyberpunk street at night, with the camera walking past traditional Japanese buildings illuminated by red neon signs. Palm trees line the right side while a chain-link fence and construction barriers occupy the left, all bathed in the warm glow of streetlights cutting through the heavy rain and haze.

scene_state.functional_zone: street intersection with accumulated trash and debris

events.description: exits the covered sidewalk area and steps onto the asphalt street intersection
camera tilts down to examine trash bags and discarded items piled near a dumpster

agents.ego_description: crossing the wet asphalt road and pausing to look at trash accumulation near the curb

entered.detail: pile of blue and gray garbage bags and scattered cardboard boxes on the wet ground
large black plastic dumpster partially filled with debris
large illuminated advertisement screen displaying colorful graphics

segments.scene_description: The camera crosses from the sidewalk onto the wet asphalt intersection, revealing accumulated trash bags and a dumpster near the curb. The traditional buildings fall behind as the view opens up to show distant billboards and futuristic skyscrapers through the rain, with streetlights now directly ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with neon storefronts and pedestrians

events.description: pedestrians carrying umbrellas appear walking along the sidewalk

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk passing other pedestrians carrying umbrellas in the rain

notable_agents.action: person with black umbrella walking in the opposite direction wearing dark clothing

entered.detail: low building with bright red neon signage indicating 24-hour operation
tall modern towers with illuminated windows visible through the rain haze

segments.scene_description: Moving along the opposite sidewalk, the camera passes a 24-hour convenience store with bright red neon signage. Other pedestrians with umbrellas appear, walking through the rain. The trash bags are left behind as the view opens to reveal futuristic skyscrapers looming in the distance through the atmospheric haze.

scene_state.functional_zone: major intersection with multiple neon signs and commercial buildings

events.description: slight turn to the right while approaching the crosswalk area

agents.ego_description: approaching a larger intersection while following a pedestrian with an umbrella ahead

notable_agents.action: person with umbrella walking ahead in the same direction toward the intersection

entered.detail: tall signal poles with multiple traffic lights hanging over the intersection
various commercial buildings with colorful neon signage and illuminated windows

segments.scene_description: The final segment approaches a major intersection with traffic lights and multiple neon-lit storefronts. A pedestrian with an umbrella walks ahead in the same direction, while vehicles pass on the wet streets. The 24-hour store falls behind as the camera moves toward the crosswalk, with futuristic towers and bright commercial signage dominating the view ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person walk through a rain-soaked cyberpunk street that transitions from a traditional Japanese-inspired neighborhood into a dense, futuristic commercial district. It begins by moving past traditional buildings illuminated by red neon signs and palm trees, with streetlights cutting through heavy rain and haze. As the camera crosses a wet asphalt intersection past piles of trash bags, the traditional architecture recedes to reveal distant billboards and towering skyscrapers looming through the mist. The scene then shifts along an opposite sidewalk past a bright 24-hour convenience store and pedestrians with umbrellas, leaving the debris behind as the urban scale expands. Finally, the camera approaches a major intersection filled with traffic lights and neon-lit storefronts, moving toward a crosswalk where futuristic towers and bright commercial signage dominate the horizon.
